---
pagetitle: "Yojiro Ito — Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry:
      - top=1in
      - bottom=1in
      - left=0.7in
      - right=0.7in
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: cvlink
    urlcolor: cvlink
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \usepackage{parskip}
        \usepackage{xcolor}

        % リンク色はサイトのリンク色に合わせる
        \definecolor{cvlink}{HTML}{006580}

        % main.tex と同じ見出し書式
        \titleformat{\section}{\Large\bfseries}{}{0em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsection}[block]{\bfseries\MakeUppercase}{\thesubsection}{1em}{}
        \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{1.5ex plus 1ex minus .2ex}{1.5ex plus .2ex}
---

```{=latex}
% ---------- 氏名 ----------
\begin{center}
\LARGE\textbf{Yojiro Ito}
\end{center}

% ---------- 連絡先（2段組） ----------
\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.48\textwidth}
2-1-1, Nihonbashi-Hongokucho\\
Chuo-ku, Tokyo, Japan
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.48\textwidth}
E-mail: \href{mailto:youjirou.itou@boj.or.jp}{youjirou.itou@boj.or.jp}\\
\hspace*{3.2em} \href{mailto:yojirou0913@gmail.com}{yojirou0913@gmail.com}\\
Homepage: \href{https://yojiroito.github.io/website/}{yojiroito.github.io/website}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{1em}
```

<!-- ===================================================================
     以下「手書き区画」は CV にしか出ない情報です。
     Web サイトと共有しないため YAML 化していません。直接編集してください。
     =================================================================== -->

# Current Position

Economist, Economic and Financial Studies Division, Institute for Monetary and Economic Studies (IMES), Bank of Japan \hfill 2024--\hspace*{2em}

# Previous Positions

Economist, Research and Statistics Department, Bank of Japan \hfill 2022--2024\
Economist, Economic and Financial Studies Division, IMES, Bank of Japan \hfill 2020--2021\
Economist, Financial System and Bank Examination Department, Bank of Japan \hfill 2017--2020\
Economist, Kobe Branch, Bank of Japan \hfill 2016--2017\
Economist, Research and Statistics Department, Bank of Japan \hfill 2015--2016

# Education

Ph.D. student in Commerce (Economics concentration), Waseda University \hfill 2024--\hspace*{2em}\
MSc in Economics (with Distinction), University College London \hfill 2021--2022\
MEng in Communications and Computer Engineering, Tokyo Institute of Technology \hfill 2013--2015\
BEng in Computer Science, Tokyo Institute of Technology \hfill 2009--2013

# Research

<!-- ===================================================================
     ここから下は data/research.yml から自動生成される区画です。
     直接編集せず、data/research.yml を編集してください。
     =================================================================== -->

## Publications

{{< include _generated/publications-cv.md >}}

\vspace{0.4em}

## Working Papers

{{< include _generated/working-papers-cv.md >}}

\vspace{0.4em}

## Works in Progress

{{< include _generated/works-in-progress-cv.md >}}

<!-- ===================================================================
     ここから再び手書き区画（Web サイトには出ない情報）
     =================================================================== -->

# Research Projects

Project Member, "Firm Dynamics and Business Dynamism in Japan," Research Institute of Economy, Trade and Industry (RIETI) \hfill 2026--\hspace*{2em}
